mapper.select: select count(*) from CARD_LEARNING_DATA cld where

select
from CARD_LEARNING_DATA cld where
order by cld.BDGT_PRFR_YM desc
limit #{limitCnt}
mapper.sql: /*view colmn name : db comment*/ cld.HDQR_BOB_DCD, /*대상 : 1/2*/ cld.FRRG_TS, /*적용일시 : 최초등록일시*/ cld.BRCD, /*부점 : 부점코드*/ cld.LSMD_EMN, /*직원*/ /*예산집행사유내용*/ cld.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, /*예산집행사유코드 : 비목집행사유내용(비목-집행사유코드)*/ cld.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO, /*예산관리비목관리번호*/ cld.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, /*예산(세부)사업ID*/ cld.CDN, /*카드번호*/ cld.BDGT_TSTM_USE_HMS, /*예산증빙사용시각*/ cld.AMSL_AMT, /*매출금액*/ cld.AFST_NM, /*가맹점명*/ cld.TPBS_NM, /*업종명*/ cld.BZDY_YN, /*영업일여부*/ cld.AFST_DTL_ADR, /*가맹점상세주소*/ cld.BRNC_ADR, /*부점주소*/ cld.AFST_BZN, /*가맹점사업자등록번호*/ cld.AMSL_AFST_NO, /*매출가맹점번호*/ cld.AFST_TPBCD, /*가맹점업종코드*/ cld.BDGT_PRFR_YM, /*예산집행년월*/ cld.TSTM_YMD /*카드증빙년월일*/
mapper.select: select cld.BRCD , cld.CDN , cld.BDGT_TSTM_USE_HMS , cld.AMSL_AMT , cld.AFST_NM , cld.TPBS_NM , cld.BZDY_YN , cld.AFST_DTL_ADR , cld.BRNC_ADR , cld.AFST_BZN , cld.AMSL_AFST_NO , cld.AFST_TPBCD , cld.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO , cld.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , cld.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON from CARD_LEARNING_DATA cld where order by cld.FRRG_TS desc limit 100
